description: Household planning log with repeated identifier and relationship probes.

turns.text: The orchard watering controller is registered under code MINT-457 in the home dashboard.
Orchard watering controller code MINT-457 is in the home dashboard.
Rowan Hale picks Lyra Beck up from robotics club whenever practice runs late.
Rowan Hale handles Lyra Beck's late robotics-club pickup.
The spare house key is sealed in locker KD-918 at the community office.
The spare house key is in community-office locker KD-918.
Celia Frost sends every renovation invoice to Omar Venn, who reconciles the household ledger.
Celia Frost sends renovation invoices to household-ledger reviewer Omar Venn.
The porch paint sample has catalog label SABLE-336 taped underneath the lid.
Porch paint sample label SABLE-336 is taped under the lid.
The borrowed folding table carries storage sticker PEBBLE-704 by its left hinge.
Folding-table storage sticker PEBBLE-704 is beside the left hinge.
What code identifies the orchard watering controller?
MINT-457.
Who picks Lyra Beck up after late robotics practice?
Rowan Hale.
Which locker contains the spare house key?
Who receives renovation invoices from Celia Frost?
Omar Venn.
The cat discovered the empty laundry basket and has claimed it as a throne.
Laundry operations now require royal approval.
The upstairs window finally stopped rattling after I tightened the latch.
A small repair with an outsized effect on quiet evenings.
We have enough soup left for lunch, but probably not dinner.
Lunch is covered; dinner can remain tomorrow's problem.
The mail arrived early and was mostly garden catalogs.
An efficient delivery of future yard ambitions.
What was the orchard controller's dashboard code?
MINT-457.
Who handles Lyra Beck's late robotics pickup?
Rowan Hale.
Where did we seal the spare house key?
Locker KD-918 at the community office.
Which ledger reviewer gets Celia Frost's renovation invoices?
Omar Venn.
